name: Set Slot
desc: Sets a single slot in an inventory window. Used for cursor updates, specific slot changes, and armor slot updates.

fields.name: item
fields.desc: ItemStack to place in slot (null = clear)

notes: windowId=-1 special case: updates the cursor item (the item held by the mouse cursor). windowId=0: updates player inventory. S2F is sent for EVERY slot change — armor equips, hotbar changes, cursor picks up/drops. Inventory modules track S2F to detect armor swaps and item pickups.

modules.name: ChestStealer
modules.purpose: Track individual slot updates for inventory management.

modules.name: InvManager
modules.purpose: Track individual slot updates for inventory management.

modules.name: AutoArmor
modules.purpose: Track individual slot updates for inventory management.
